name: Kelsey Machen
title: Director of Vendor Management
bio:
As Director of Vendor Management at Birdsey Group, Kelsey Machen oversees vendor relationships, coordination, and performance standards across construction-related engagements. Her work helps ensure vendor activity supports client expectations, project timelines, and the quality standards Birdsey is known for.

Kelsey’s role reinforces the Birdsey Standard through accountability, transparency, and disciplined relationship management.
